#IWG forage combo plot N:E
```{r}
# Layer all the plots together!
colors <- c("Year 1 Summer Harvest" = "red", 
            "Year 1 Fall Harvest" = "pink", 
            "Year 2 Summer Harvest" = "blue", 
            "Year 2 Fall Harvest" = "lightblue", 
            "Year 3 Summer Harvest" = "darkgreen",
            "Year 3 Fall Harvest" = "green")
legend_order <- c("Year 1 Summer Harvest", "Year 1 Fall Harvest", 
                  "Year 2 Summer Harvest", "Year 2 Fall Harvest",
                  "Year 3 Summer Harvest", "Year 3 Fall Harvest")
NdXSI$P <- factor(NdXSI$P, levels = desired_order)
# equations come from sorted_data3 from each harvest year chunk. This is the emmeans of P
IFcomboplot <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = NdXSI, aes(x = N, y = PlotIWGDryKgHa, color = "Year 1 Summer Harvest", shape= CROP)) +
  geom_point(data = NdXFI, aes(x = N, y = PlotIWGDryKgHa, color = "Year 1 Fall Harvest", shape= CROP)) +
  geom_point(data = NdYSI, aes(x = N, y = PlotIWGDryKgHa, color = "Year 2 Summer Harvest", shape= CROP)) +
  geom_point(data = NdYFI, aes(x = N, y = PlotIWGDryKgHa, color = "Year 2 Fall Harvest", shape= CROP)) +
  geom_point(data = NdZSI, aes(x = N, y = PlotIWGDryKgHa, color = "Year 3 Summer Harvest", shape= CROP)) +
  geom_point(data = NdZFI, aes(x = N, y = PlotIWGDryKgHa, color = "Year 3 Fall Harvest", shape= CROP)) +  
  labs(x = "N-Rate (kg ha-1)", y = "IWG Forage Yield",
    color = "Harvest", shape = "Cropping System") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160)) +
#  ylim(0, 14800) +
  facet_wrap(~P, scales = "free", ncol = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors, limits = legend_order)+
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(4, 25), labels = c("Intercropped", "Monoculture IWG"))+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXSI, P== "MN"), fun=~1737.51*exp(0.0027*.x),color='red')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXSI, P== "NY"), fun=~2695.81*exp(0.0050*.x),color='red')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXSI, P== "KS"), fun=~7357.19*exp(0.0007*.x),color='red')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXSI, P== "WI"), fun=~6843.18*exp(0.0009*.x),color='red')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXFI, P== "MN"), fun=~651.94*exp(0.0020*.x),color='pink')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXFI, P== "NY"), fun=~263.84*exp(0.0044*.x),color='pink')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdXFI, P== "WI"), fun=~283.04*exp(-0.0010*.x),color='pink')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdYSI, P== "MN"), fun=~3922.15*exp(0.0018*.x),color='blue')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdYSI, P== "NY"), fun=~2688.03*exp(0.0049*.x),color='blue')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdYSI, P== "KS"), fun=~2145.60*exp(0.0008*.x),color='blue')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdYSI, P== "WI"), fun=~3315.20*exp(0.0042*.x),color='blue')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdYFI, P== "MN"), fun=~832.34*exp(0.0026*.x),color='lightblue')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdYFI, P== "NY"), fun=~550.29*exp(0.0016*.x),color='lightblue')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdYFI, P== "WI"), fun=~392.53*exp(0.0030*.x),color='lightblue')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdZSI, P== "MN"), fun=~2073.88*exp(0.0028*.x),color='darkgreen')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdZSI, P== "NY"), fun=~306.88*exp(0.0026*.x),color='darkgreen')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdZSI, P== "WI"), fun=~6845.80*exp(0.0023*.x),color='darkgreen')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdZFI, P== "MN"), fun=~407.87*exp(0.0019*.x),color='green')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdZFI, P== "NY"), fun=~1104.52*exp(0.0007*.x),color='green')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdZFI, P== "WI"), fun=~758.02*exp(0.0008*.x),color='green')
print(IFcomboplot)
#ggsave("figures/forage/IFcomboplot.jpg", plot = IFcomboplot, width = 12, height = 10, dpi = 300)
```



## Alfalfa Forage Yield 

#Alf forage year 1 summer
```{r}
#LINEAR 
modNXSA<-lmer(PlotAlfDryKgHa~N*P*CROP + (1|P:Rep), data=NdXSA)
anova(modNXSA)
#Check assumptions
NXSA_resid<-resid(modNXSA)
qqnorm(NXSA_resid)
qqline(NXSA_resid)
plot(modNXSA)
#log transform
modNXSA1<-lmer(log(PlotAlfDryKgHa)~N*P*CROP + (1|P:Rep), data=NdXSA)
anova(modNXSA1)
#Check assumptions
NXSA_resid1<-resid(modNXSA1)
qqnorm(NXSA_resid1)
qqline(NXSA_resid1)
plot(modNXSA1)
# could use either, normal is slightly better and includes significance for N:E and N:C

emtrends(modNXSA1, ~P*CROP, var= "N")
emtrends(modNXSA1, ~1, var= "N", infer= TRUE) #(averages 8 slopes across interactions)
emmip(modNXSA1, P~N|CROP, at=list(N=c(40, 80, 120)))

modNXSA1_summary <- summary(modNXSA1)
modNXSA1_coeff <- as.data.frame(modNXSA1_summary$coefficients)%>%
  filter(`Pr(>|t|)` < 0.05)
# Create custom table using kable and kableExtra
save_kable(
  knitr::kable(modNXSA1_coeff, 
               caption = "Y1 Summer Mixed-Effects Model: log(PlotAlfDryKgHa) ~ Nrate * Location * CROPsystem + (1 | Rep)") %>%
    kable_styling(full_width = TRUE, 
                  position = "center", 
                  bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed")),
  file = "figures/forage/ALF_table_significant_coeff_yr1S.html")
# ALF_table_significant_coeff_yr1S    

#(old)
#rec
modNXSA1N<-lmer(log(PlotAlfDryKgHa)~N+P*CROP + (1|P:Rep), data=NdXSA)
emtrends(modNXSA1N, ~1, var= "N", infer= TRUE)
emmip(modNXSA1N, P~N|CROP, at=list(N=c(0, 80, 160)))

max(NdXSA$PlotAlfDryKgHa)
#linear plots
NdXSA$predicted <- predict(modNXSA1, newdata = NdXSA, re.form = NA)
ggplot(NdXSA, aes(x = N, y = PlotAlfDryKgHa, color = C, group= C)) +
    geom_point() + geom_line(aes(N, exp(predicted)))+ #regression through backtransformed predicted values
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg/ha)", y = "Alf Forage Yield (Kg/ha)") +  # Label the axes
  ggtitle("Yr 1 S Relationship between Alf Forage Yield and N-rate") +  # Add a title
scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160))+ #fix x axis scale
#  ylim(0, 11000) +
  facet_wrap(~P, scales = "free_y",ncol=2)+ #make it by location (remove to make it across locations)
  scale_color_discrete(name = "Cropping System")  #legend for colors
# save figures/forage/ALFforage_Nrate_yr1S.jpeg  775x630

#Threeway means
NXSA1emm <- compute_emmeansNXS("modNXSA1")
#write.csv(NXSA1emm, 'data/Final_Data/NXSA1emm.csv')

#Alf forage figure E:C (XS)
max(NdXSA$predicted)
exp(9.08082)
XSAemmsPC <- emmeans(modNXSA1, ~ P*CROP, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means (excluding N)
emms_df <- as.data.frame(XSAemmsPC)
cld_dataXSAPC <- cld(XSAemmsPC, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataXSAPC)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("P", "CROP"))
custom_labels <- c("Intercrop", "Monoculture Alfalfa")
custom_colors <- c("darkmagenta", "coral1") 
AXSPC<-ggplot(NdXSA, aes(x = P, y = exp(predicted), color = CROP)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(x = "Environment", y = "Alfalfa Forage Yield") +
  geom_point(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, y = response), 
             size = 4, shape = 18, color = "black")+ 
  geom_errorbar(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), 
                width = 0.2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = response.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = 0, hjust = 2)+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Cropping System", labels = custom_labels,values = custom_colors)+
     ggtitle("Year 1 Summer")+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))+
   guides(color = "none")+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(1000, 3000, 5000, 7000,9000), limits = c(0, 9500))
print(AXSPC)
#ggsave("figures/forage/AXSPC.jpg", plot = AXSPC, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)


#alf forage plot N (XS)
#EQUATION tables JUST N 
emtrends_result<-emtrends(modNXSA1,~ 1, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
emtrends_df <- as.data.frame(emtrends_result)
emmeans_results<-emmeans(modNXSA1, ~1, at=list(N=0))
emmeans_df <- as.data.frame(emmeans_results)
emtrends_df <- emtrends_df %>% mutate(key = 1)
emmeans_df <- emmeans_df %>% mutate(key = 1)
merged_df <- inner_join(emtrends_df, emmeans_df, by = "key")%>%
  select(emmean, N.trend, SE.x)
new_df <- merged_df %>%
  mutate(equation = sprintf("=%.2f*e(%.4fN)", exp(emmean), N.trend),  SE.x = sprintf("%.4f", SE.x),  percent_change = sprintf("%.2f%%", (exp(N.trend) - 1) * 100))%>%
  select(-emmean, -N.trend)
new_df
#write.csv(new_df, "data/Final_Data/Nrate_esteff_ALFforage_yr1S.csv") 
AFplotN <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = NdXSA, aes(x = N, y = PlotAlfDryKgHa, shape= CROP), color= "red") +
  labs(x = "N-Rate (kg ha-1)", y = "Alfalfa Forage Yield") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160)) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("intercrop" = 4, "monoculture" = 20), labels = c("Intercropped", "Monoculture Alfalfa")) +
  geom_function(data=NdXSA, fun=~4141.15*exp(-0.0009*.x),color='red')+
  guides(
    shape = guide_legend(title = "Cropping System"))
print(AFplotN)





#Pairwise P
emmsP <- emmeans(modNXSA, ~ P, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means
cld_dataNXSAP <- cld(emmsP, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
#Pairwise C
emmsC <- emmeans(modNXSA, ~ CROP, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means 
cld_dataNXSAC <- cld(emmsC, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
#Pairwise N
N_levels <- c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160)
emmsN <- emmeans(modNXSA, specs = ~ N, at = list(N = N_levels), type = "response")
cld_dataNXSAN <- cld(emmsN, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
cld_dataNXSAN$response <- format(cld_dataNXSAN$response, digits = 5)
cld_dataNXSAN<- cld_dataNXSAN %>%
  select(N, response, .group)
colnames(cld_dataNXSAN) <- c("N","ALF Forage (kg ha-1)", "Group")
cld_dataNXSAN  |> 
  data.frame() |> 
  kbl(align = "c") |> 
  kable_paper(full_width = F) |> 
  column_spec(1, bold = T)
#Pairwise P:C
emmsPC <- emmeans(modNXSA, ~ P*CROP, type= "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means
cld_dataNXSAPC <- cld(emmsPC, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
cld_dataNXSAPC$response <- format(cld_dataNXSAPC$response, digits = 5)
rownames(cld_dataNXSAPC) <- NULL
cld_dataNXSAPC<- cld_dataNXSAPC %>%
  select(P,CROP, response, .group)
colnames(cld_dataNXSAPC) <- c("Site","Cropping System","Alfalfa Forage (kg ha-1)", "Group")
cld_dataNXSAPC  |> 
  data.frame() |> 
  kbl(align = "c") |> 
  kable_paper(full_width = F) |> 
  column_spec(1, bold = T)

#This gives us the slope for each interactions as well as a P value indicating significance level for that slope
emtrends(modNXSA,~ P*CROP, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
emtrends(modNXSA,~ P, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
emtrends(modNXSA,~ CROP, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
emtrends(modNXSA,~N, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
summary(modNXSA)
emtrends(modNXSA,~ P, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
summary(modNXSA)
```

#Alf forage year 1 fall
```{r}
#LINEAR
modNXFA<-lmer(PlotAlfDryKgHa~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdXFA)
anova(modNXFA)
#Check assumptions
NXFA_resid<-resid(modNXFA)
qqnorm(NXFA_resid)
qqline(NXFA_resid)
plot(modNXFA)
#log transform
modNXFA1<-lmer(log(PlotAlfDryKgHa)~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdXFA)
anova(modNXFA1)
#Check assumptions
NXFA1_resid<-resid(modNXFA1)
qqnorm(NXFA1_resid)
qqline(NXFA1_resid)
plot(modNXFA1)

modNXFA1_summary <- summary(modNXFA1)
modNXFA1_coeff <- as.data.frame(modNXFA1_summary$coefficients)%>%
  filter(`Pr(>|t|)` < 0.05)
# Create custom table using kable and kableExtra
save_kable(
  knitr::kable(modNXFA1_coeff, 
               caption = "Y1 Fall Mixed-Effects Model: log(PlotAlfDryKgHa) ~ Nrate * Location * CROPsystem + (1 | Rep)") %>%
    kable_styling(full_width = TRUE, 
                  position = "center", 
                  bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed")),
  file = "figures/forage/ALF_table_significant_coeff_yr1F.html")
# ALF_table_significant_coeff_yr1F

max(NdXFA$PlotAlfDryKgHa)
#linear plots
NdXFA$predicted <- predict(modNXFA1, newdata = NdXFA, re.form = NA)
ggplot(NdXFA, aes(x = N, y = PlotAlfDryKgHa, color = C, group= C)) +
    geom_point() + geom_line(aes(N, exp(predicted)))+ #regression through backtransformed predicted values
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg/ha)", y = "Alf Forage Yield (Kg/ha)") +  # Label the axes
  ggtitle("Yr 1 F Relationship between Alf Forage Yield and N-rate") +  # Add a title
scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160))+ #fix x axis scale
#  ylim(0, 3300) +
  facet_wrap(~P, scales = "free_y",ncol=2)+ #make it by location (remove to make it across locations)
  scale_color_discrete(name = "Cropping System")  #legend for colors
# save figures/forage/ALFforage_Nrate_yr1F.jpeg  775x630

#Threeway means
NXFA1emm <- compute_emmeansNXF("modNXFA1")
#write.csv(NXFA1emm, 'data/Final_Data/NXFA1emm.csv')

#Alf forage figure E:C (XF)
XFAemmsPC <- emmeans(modNXFA1, ~ P*CROP, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means (excluding N)
emms_df <- as.data.frame(XFAemmsPC)
cld_dataXFAPC <- cld(XFAemmsPC, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataXFAPC)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("P", "CROP"))
custom_labels <- c("Intercrop", "Monoculture Alfalfa")
custom_colors <- c("darkmagenta", "coral1") 
AXFPC<-ggplot(NdXFA, aes(x = P, y = exp(predicted), color = CROP)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(x = "Environment", y = "Alfalfa Forage Yield") +
  geom_point(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, y = response), 
             size = 4, shape = 18, color = "black")+ 
  geom_errorbar(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), 
                width = 0.2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = response.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = 0, hjust = 2)+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Cropping System", labels = custom_labels,values = custom_colors)+
     ggtitle("Year 1 Fall")+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(1000, 3000, 5000, 7000,9000), limits = c(0, 3500))
print(AXFPC)
#ggsave("figures/forage/AXFPC.jpg", plot = AXFPC, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)

#alf forage plot N (YS)
#EQUATION tables JUST N 
emtrends_result<-emtrends(modNXFA1,~ 1, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
emtrends_df <- as.data.frame(emtrends_result)
emmeans_results<-emmeans(modNXFA1, ~1, at=list(N=0))
emmeans_df <- as.data.frame(emmeans_results)
emtrends_df <- emtrends_df %>% mutate(key = 1)
emmeans_df <- emmeans_df %>% mutate(key = 1)
merged_df <- inner_join(emtrends_df, emmeans_df, by = "key")%>%
  select(emmean, N.trend, SE.x)
new_df <- merged_df %>%
  mutate(equation = sprintf("=%.2f*e(%.4fN)", exp(emmean), N.trend),  SE.x = sprintf("%.4f", SE.x),  percent_change = sprintf("%.2f%%", (exp(N.trend) - 1) * 100))%>%
  select(-emmean, -N.trend)
new_df
#write.csv(new_df, "data/Final_Data/Nrate_esteff_ALFforage_yr1F.csv") 





#Pairwise P
emmsP <- emmeans(modNXFA1, ~ P, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means
cld_dataNXFAP <- cld(emmsP, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
#Pairwise P:C
emmsPC <- emmeans(modNXFA1, ~ P*CROP, type= "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means
cld_dataNXFAPC <- cld(emmsPC, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
cld_dataNXFAPC$response <- format(cld_dataNXFAPC$response, digits = 5)
rownames(cld_dataNXFAPC) <- NULL
cld_dataNXFAPC<- cld_dataNXFAPC %>%
  select(P,CROP, response, .group)
colnames(cld_dataNXFAPC) <- c("Site","Cropping System","ALF Forage (kg ha-1)", "Group")
cld_dataNXFAPC  |> 
  data.frame() |> 
  kbl(align = "c") |> 
  kable_paper(full_width = F) |> 
  column_spec(1, bold = T)

emtrends_result<-emtrends(modNXFA1,~ 1, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
emtrends_df <- as.data.frame(emtrends_result)
emmeans_results<-emmeans(modNXFA1, ~1, at=list(N=0))
emmeans_df <- as.data.frame(emmeans_results)
emtrends_df <- emtrends_df %>% mutate(key = 1)
emmeans_df <- emmeans_df %>% mutate(key = 1)
merged_df <- inner_join(emtrends_df, emmeans_df, by = "key")%>%
  select(emmean, N.trend, SE.x)
view(merged_df)
```

#Alf forage year 2 summer
```{r}
# remove MN plot 1222, it only has 0 for values
NdYSA <- NdYSA %>%
  filter(Plot != 1222)

#LINEAR 
modNYSA<-lmer(PlotAlfDryKgHa~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdYSA)
anova(modNYSA)
#Check assumptions
NYSA_resid<-resid(modNYSA)
qqnorm(NYSA_resid)
qqline(NYSA_resid)
plot(modNYSA)
#Logtransform
modNYSA1<-lmer(log(PlotAlfDryKgHa)~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdYSA)
anova(modNYSA1)
#check assumptions logtransform
NYSA_resid1<-resid(modNYSA1)
qqnorm(NYSA_resid1)
qqline(NYSA_resid1)
plot(modNYSA1)
# normal is slightly better and has additional significance for N:E and N:C

modNYSA1_summary <- summary(modNYSA1)
modNYSA1_coeff <- as.data.frame(modNYSA1_summary$coefficients)%>%
  filter(`Pr(>|t|)` < 0.05)
# Create custom table using kable and kableExtra
save_kable(
  knitr::kable(modNYSA1_coeff, 
               caption = "Y2 Summer Mixed-Effects Model: log(PlotAlfDryKgHa) ~ Nrate * Location * CROPsystem + (1 | Rep)") %>%
    kable_styling(full_width = TRUE, 
                  position = "center", 
                  bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed")),
  file = "figures/forage/ALF_table_significant_coeff_yr2S.html")
# ALF_table_significant_coeff_yr2S

max(NdYSA$PlotAlfDryKgHa)
#LINEAR plots
NdYSA$predicted <- predict(modNYSA1, newdata = NdYSA, re.form = NA)
ggplot(NdYSA, aes(x = N, y = PlotAlfDryKgHa, color = CROP, group= CROP)) +
    geom_point() + geom_line(aes(N, exp(predicted)))+ #regression through backtransformed predicted values
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg/ha)", y = "Alf Forage Yield (Kg/ha)") +  # Label the axes
  ggtitle("Yr 2 S Relationship between Alf Forage Yield and N-rate") +  # Add a title
scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160))+ #fix x axis scale
  facet_wrap(~P, scales = "free_y",ncol=2)+ #make it by location (remove to make it across locations)
  scale_color_discrete(name = "Cropping System")  #legend for colors
# save figures/forage/ALFforage_Nrate_yr2S.jpeg  775x630

#Threeway means
NYSA1emm <- compute_emmeansNYS("modNYSA1")
#write.csv(NYSA1emm, 'data/Final_Data/NYSA1emm.csv')

#Alf forage E plot (YS)
NYSAemmsP <- emmeans(modNYSA1, ~ P, type = "response") 
emms_df <- as.data.frame(NYSAemmsP)
cld_dataNYSAP <- cld(NYSAemmsP, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataNYSAP)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("P"))
AYSE<-ggplot(NdYSA, aes(x = P, y = exp(predicted))) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 3, alpha = 0.7, color="darkgreen") +
  labs(x = "Environment", y = "Alfalfa Forage Yield") +
  geom_point(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, y = response), 
             size = 4, shape = 18, color = "black")+ 
  geom_errorbar(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), 
                width = 0.2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = response.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = 0, hjust = 1.8)
print(AYSE)
#ggsave("figures/forage/AYSE.jpg", plot = AYSE, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)

#Alfalfa forage figure C (YS)
YSAemmsC <- emmeans(modNYSA1, ~ CROP, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means (excluding N)
emms_df <- as.data.frame(YSAemmsC)
cld_dataYSAC <- cld(YSAemmsC, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataYSAC)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("CROP"))
custom_labels <- c("Intercrop", "Monoculture Alfalfa")
custom_colors <- c("darkmagenta", "cyan") 
AYSC<-ggplot(NdYSA, aes(x = CROP, y = exp(predicted), color = CROP)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(x = "Cropping System", y = "Alfalfa Forage Yield") +
  geom_point(data = emms_df, aes(x = CROP, y = response), 
             size = 4, shape = 18, color = "black")+ 
  geom_errorbar(data = emms_df, aes(x = CROP, ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), 
                width = 0.2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x =CROP, y = response.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = 0, hjust = 2)+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Cropping System", labels = custom_labels,values = custom_colors)+
     ggtitle("Year 2 Summer")+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
print(AYSC)
#ggsave("figures/forage/AYSC.jpg", plot = AYSC, width = 6, height = 8, dpi = 300)






#Pairwise P
emmsP <- emmeans(modNYSA, ~ P, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means (excluding N)
cld_dataNYSAP <- cld(emmsP, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
cld_dataNYSAP$response <- format(cld_dataNYSAP$response, digits = 5)
rownames(cld_dataNYSAP) <- NULL
cld_dataNYSAP<- cld_dataNYSAP %>%
  select(P, response, .group)
colnames(cld_dataNYSAP) <- c("Site","ALF Forage (kg ha-1)", "Group")
cld_dataNYSAP  |> 
  data.frame() |> 
  kbl(align = "c") |> 
  kable_paper(full_width = F) |> 
  column_spec(1, bold = T)
#Pairwise C
emmsC <- emmeans(modNYSA, ~ CROP, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means (excluding N)
cld_dataNYSAC <- cld(emmsC, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
#Pairwise N:C
emmsNC <- emmeans(modNYSA, ~ N*CROP,at = list(N = N_levels), type= "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means
cld_dataNYSANC <- cld(emmsNC, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
cld_dataNYSANC$response <- format(cld_dataNYSANC$response, digits = 5)
rownames(cld_dataNYSANC) <- NULL
cld_dataNYSANC<- cld_dataNYSANC %>%
  select(N,CROP, response, .group)
colnames(cld_dataNYSANC) <- c("N","Cropping System","Alfalfa Forage (kg ha-1)", "Group")
cld_dataNYSANC  |> 
  data.frame() |> 
  kbl(align = "c") |> 
  kable_paper(full_width = F) |> 
  column_spec(1, bold = T)

#slope stuff
emtrends_result<-emtrends(modNYSA,~ CROP, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
  emtrends_df <- as.data.frame(emtrends_result)
  desired_order_C <- c("intercrop", "monoculture")
  emtrends_df$C <- factor(emtrends_df$C, levels = desired_order_C)
  #view(emtrends_df)
  
#equations table
emtrends_result<-emtrends(modNYSA,~ CROP, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
emtrends_df <- as.data.frame(emtrends_result)
emmeans_results<-emmeans(modNYSA, ~CROP, at=list(N=0))
emmeans_df <- as.data.frame(emmeans_results)
merged_df <- emtrends_df %>%
  inner_join(emmeans_df, by = c( "CROP")) %>%
  select(CROP, emmean, N.trend, SE.x)
#view(merged_df)
merged_df$CROP <- factor(merged_df$C, levels = c("intercrop", "monoculture"))  # Preferred order for CROP
# Create a new data frame with the calculated column
new_df <- merged_df %>%
  mutate(equation = sprintf("=%.2f*e(%.4fN)", exp(emmean), N.trend),  SE.x = sprintf("%.4f", SE.x),  percent_change = sprintf("%.2f%%", (exp(N.trend) - 1) * 100))%>%
  select(-emmean, -N.trend)
sorted_df <- new_df %>%
  arrange( CROP)
#view(sorted_df)
```

#Alf forage year 2 fall
```{r}
#LINEAR
modNYFA<-lmer(PlotAlfDryKgHa~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdYFA)
anova(modNYFA)
#Check assumptions
NYFA_resid<-resid(modNYFA)
qqnorm(NYFA_resid)
qqline(NYFA_resid)
plot(modNYFA)
#log transform 
modNYFA1<-lmer(log(PlotAlfDryKgHa)~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdYFA)
anova(modNYFA1)
#Check assumptions
NYFA1_resid<-resid(modNYFA1)
qqnorm(NYFA1_resid)
qqline(NYFA1_resid)
plot(modNYFA1)

modNYFA1_summary <- summary(modNYFA1)
modNYFA1_coeff <- as.data.frame(modNYFA1_summary$coefficients)%>%
  filter(`Pr(>|t|)` < 0.05)
# Create custom table using kable and kableExtra
save_kable(
  knitr::kable(modNYFA1_coeff, 
               caption = "Y2 Fall Mixed-Effects Model: log(PlotAlfDryKgHa) ~ Nrate * Location * CROPsystem + (1 | Rep)") %>%
    kable_styling(full_width = TRUE, 
                  position = "center", 
                  bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed")),
  file = "figures/forage/ALF_table_significant_coeff_yr2F.html")
# ALF_table_significant_coeff_yr2F

max(NdYFA$PlotAlfDryKgHa)
#LINEAR plots
NdYFA$predicted <- predict(modNYFA1, newdata = NdYFA, re.form = NA)
ggplot(NdYFA, aes(x = N, y = PlotAlfDryKgHa, color = CROP, group= CROP)) +
    geom_point() + geom_line(aes(N, exp(predicted)))+ #regression through backtransformed predicted values
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg/ha)", y = "Alf Forage Yield (Kg/ha)") +  # Label the axes
  ggtitle("Yr 2 F Relationship between Alf Forage Yield and N-rate") +  # Add a title
scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160))+ #fix x axis scale
  facet_wrap(~P, scales = "free_y",ncol=2)+ #make it by location (remove to make it across locations)
  scale_color_discrete(name = "Cropping System")  #legend for colors
# save figures/forage/ALFforage_Nrate_yr2F.jpeg  775x630

#Threeway means
NYFA1emm <- compute_emmeansNYF("modNYFA1")
#write.csv(NYFA1emm, 'data/Final_Data/NYFA1emm.csv')

#Alf forage E plot (YF)
NYFAemmsP <- emmeans(modNYFA1, ~ P, type = "response") 
emms_df <- as.data.frame(NYFAemmsP)
cld_dataNYFAP <- cld(NYFAemmsP, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataNYFAP)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("P"))
AYFE<-ggplot(NdYFA, aes(x = P, y = exp(predicted))) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 3, alpha = 0.7, color="darkgreen") +
  labs(x = "Environment", y = "Alfalfa Forage Yield") +
  geom_point(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, y = response), 
             size = 4, shape = 18, color = "black")+ 
  geom_errorbar(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), 
                width = 0.2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = response.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = 0, hjust = 1.8)
print(AYFE)
#ggsave("figures/forage/AYFE.jpg", plot = AYFE, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)

#equations table (N equations across cropping system)
emtrends_result<-emtrends(modNYFA1,~ CROP, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
  emtrends_df <- as.data.frame(emtrends_result)
  desired_order_P <- c("MN", "NY", "KS", "WI")
emmeans_results<-emmeans(modNYFA1, ~ CROP, at=list(N=0))
emmeans_df <- as.data.frame(emmeans_results)
merged_df <- emtrends_df %>%
  inner_join(emmeans_df, by = c("CROP")) %>%
  select(CROP, emmean, N.trend, SE.x)
merged_df$CROP <- factor(merged_df$CROP, levels = c("inter", "monoA"))  # Preferred order for CROP
# Create a new data frame with the calculated column
new_df <- merged_df %>%
  mutate(equation = sprintf("=%.2f*e(%.4fN)", exp(emmean), N.trend),  SE.x = sprintf("%.4f", SE.x),  percent_change = sprintf("%.2f%%", (exp(N.trend) - 1) * 100))%>%
  select(-emmean, -N.trend)
sorted_df2 <- new_df %>%
  arrange(CROP)
#view(sorted_df2)
#write.csv(sorted_df2, "data/Final_Data/Nrate_esteff_ALFforage_yr2F_2.csv")

#N:E
# Define the desired order of 'P'
desired_order <- c("MN", "NY", "KS", "WI")
NdYFA$P <- factor(NdYFA$P, levels = desired_order)
# finding values for the function for each yr:location  
emtrends_resultYF<-emtrends(modNYFA1,~ N*P*CROP, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
  emtrends_dfYF <- as.data.frame(emtrends_resultYF)
  emtrends_dfYF$plvl <-
    ifelse(emtrends_dfYF$p.value == 0.05, ".",
    ifelse(emtrends_dfYF$p.value < 0.05  & emtrends_dfYF$p.value >= 0.01, "*",
    ifelse(emtrends_dfYF$p.value < 0.01  & emtrends_dfYF$p.value >= 0.001, "**",
    ifelse(emtrends_dfYF$p.value < 0.001, "***", ""))))
  desired_order_P <- c("MN", "NY", "KS", "WI")
  emtrends_dfYF$PC <- paste0(emtrends_dfYF$P,emtrends_dfYF$CROP)
  emtrends_dfYF$P <- factor(emtrends_dfYF$P, levels = desired_order_P)
emmeans_resultsYF<-emmeans(modNYFA1, ~N*P*CROP, at=list(N=0))
  emmeans_dfYF <- as.data.frame(emmeans_resultsYF)
  emmeans_dfYF$PC <- paste0(emmeans_dfYF$P,emmeans_dfYF$CROP)
mergedYF <- emtrends_dfYF %>%
  inner_join(emmeans_dfYF, by = c("PC")) %>%
  dplyr::select(PC, P.x, CROP.x, emmean, N.trend, SE.x, plvl)
  colnames(mergedYF)[2] <- "P"
  colnames(mergedYF)[3] <- "CROP"
mergedYF$P <- factor(mergedYF$P, levels = c("MN", "NY", "KS", "WI"))  # Preferred order for P
YF_df <- mergedYF %>%
  mutate(equation = sprintf("=%.2f*e(%.4fN)", exp(emmean), N.trend),  SE.x = sprintf("%.4f", SE.x),  percent_change = sprintf("%.2f%%", (exp(N.trend) - 1) * 100))%>%
  select(-emmean, -N.trend)
sortedYF <- YF_df %>%
  arrange(P)
sortedYF_I <- subset(sortedYF, CROP== "inter")
sortedYF_M <- subset(sortedYF, CROP== "monoA")

sym_I <- sortedYF_I %>%
  distinct(P) %>%
  mutate(
    x_sym = 0,
    y_sym = 5000
  )
sym_M <- sortedYF_M %>%
  distinct(P) %>%
  mutate(
    x_sym = 0,
    y_sym = 4750
  )

#plot
AcomboplotNEYF <- ggplot(data=NdYFA) +
  geom_point(data = NdYFA, aes(x = N, y = PlotAlfDryKgHa, shape = CROP)) +
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg ha-1)", y = "Alfalfa Forage", linetype = "Cropping System", shape = "Cropping System", color = "Harvest")+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160)) +
  facet_wrap(~P, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(4, 1),labels = c("Intercropped", "Monoculture Alfalfa"))+
  # functions come from equation in sorted
  geom_function(data=subset(NdYFA, P== "MN" & CROP == "inter"), fun=~2215.30*exp(-0.0019*.x),color='darkgrey')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdYFA, P== "MN" & CROP == "monoA"), fun=~2243.71*exp(-0.0008*.x),color='darkgrey')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdYFA, P== "NY" & CROP == "inter"), fun=~1598.31*exp(-0.0034*.x),color='darkgrey')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdYFA, P== "NY" & CROP == "monoA"), fun=~1523.22*exp(0.0001*.x),color='darkgrey')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdYFA, P== "WI" & CROP == "inter"), fun=~1949.28*exp(-0.0030*.x),color='darkgrey')+
  geom_function(data=subset(NdYFA, P== "WI" & CROP == "monoA"), fun=~1495.54*exp(-0.0006*.x),color='darkgrey')+
  geom_text(data = sortedYF_I, mapping = aes(x = 30, y = 5000, label = equation),  size=2)+ # add equation to figure
  geom_point(data = sym_I, aes(x = x_sym, y = y_sym), shape = 4, size = 1, inherit.aes = FALSE)+
  geom_text(data = sortedYF_M, mapping = aes(x = 30, y = 4750, label = equation),  size=2)+ # add equation to figure
  geom_point(data = sym_M, aes(x = x_sym, y = y_sym), shape = 1, size = 2, inherit.aes = FALSE)+
  geom_text(data = sortedYF_I, mapping = aes(x = 60, y = 5000, label = plvl))+
  geom_text(data = sortedYF_M, mapping = aes(x = 60, y = 4750, label = plvl)) # add stars to figure
# add stars to figure
print(AcomboplotNEYF)
# ggsave("figures/forage/AcomboplotNEYF.jpg", plot = AcomboplotNEYF, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)







#Pairwise N
emmsN <- emmeans(modNYFA1, ~ N,at = list(N = N_levels), type= "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means
cld_dataNYFAN <- cld(emmsN, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
#Pairwise N:C
emmsNC <- emmeans(modNYFA1, ~ N*CROP,at = list(N = N_levels), type= "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means
cld_dataNYFANC <- cld(emmsNC, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
cld_dataNYFANC$response <- format(cld_dataNYFANC$response, digits = 5)
rownames(cld_dataNYFANC) <- NULL
cld_dataNYFANC<- cld_dataNYFANC %>%
  select(N,CROP, response, .group)
colnames(cld_dataNYFANC) <- c("N","Cropping System","ALF Forage (kg ha-1)", "Group")
cld_dataNYFANC  |> 
  data.frame() |> 
  kbl(align = "c") |> 
  kable_paper(full_width = F) |> 
  column_spec(1, bold = T)

#slope stuff
emtrends_result<-emtrends(modNYFA1,~ CROP, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
  emtrends_df <- as.data.frame(emtrends_result)
  desired_order_C <- c("intercrop", "monoculture")
  emtrends_df$C <- factor(emtrends_df$C, levels = desired_order_C)
  #view(emtrends_df)
  
  #equations table
emtrends_result<-emtrends(modNYFA1,~ CROP, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
emtrends_df <- as.data.frame(emtrends_result)
emmeans_results<-emmeans(modNYFA1, ~CROP, at=list(N=0))
emmeans_df <- as.data.frame(emmeans_results)
merged_df <- emtrends_df %>%
  inner_join(emmeans_df, by = c( "CROP")) %>%
  select(CROP, emmean, N.trend, SE.x)
#view(merged_df)
merged_df$C <- factor(merged_df$C, levels = c("intercrop", "monoculture"))  # Preferred order for CROP
# Create a new data frame with the calculated column
new_df <- merged_df %>%
  mutate(equation = sprintf("=%.2f*e(%.4fN)", exp(emmean), N.trend),  SE.x = sprintf("%.4f", SE.x),  percent_change = sprintf("%.2f%%", (exp(N.trend) - 1) * 100))%>%
  select(-emmean, -N.trend)
sorted_df <- new_df %>%
  arrange( C)
#view(sorted_df)
```

#Alf forage year 3 summer
```{r}
#LINEAR
modNZSA<-lmer(PlotAlfDryKgHa~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdZSA)
anova(modNZSA)
#Check assumptions
NZSA_resid<-resid(modNZSA)
qqnorm(NZSA_resid)
qqline(NZSA_resid)
plot(NZSA_resid)
#log transform 
modNZSA1<-lmer(log(PlotAlfDryKgHa)~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdZSA)
anova(modNZSA1)
#Check assumptions
NZSA1_resid<-resid(modNZSA1)
qqnorm(NZSA1_resid)
qqline(NZSA1_resid)
plot(modNZSA1)
# normal is better, no difference in what is significant 

modNZSA1_summary <- summary(modNZSA1)
modNZSA1_coeff <- as.data.frame(modNZSA1_summary$coefficients)%>%
  filter(`Pr(>|t|)` < 0.05)
# Create custom table using kable and kableExtra
save_kable(
  knitr::kable(modNZSA1_coeff, 
               caption = "Y3 Summer Mixed-Effects Model: log(PlotAlfDryKgHa) ~ Nrate * Location * CROPsystem + (1 | Rep)") %>%
    kable_styling(full_width = TRUE, 
                  position = "center", 
                  bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed")),
  file = "figures/forage/ALF_table_significant_coeff_yr3S.html")
# ALF_table_significant_coeff_yr3S

max(NdZSA$PlotAlfDryKgHa)
#LINEAR plots
NdZSA$predicted <- predict(modNZSA1, newdata = NdZSA, re.form = NA)
ggplot(NdZSA, aes(x = N, y = PlotAlfDryKgHa, color = C, group= C)) +
    geom_point() + geom_line(aes(N, exp(predicted)))+ #regression through backtransformed predicted values
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg/ha)", y = "Alf Forage Yield (Kg/ha)") +  # Label the axes
  ggtitle("Yr 3 S Relationship between Alf Forage Yield and N-rate") +  # Add a title
scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160))+ #fix x axis scale
  facet_wrap(~P, scales = "free_y",ncol=2)+ #make it by location (remove to make it across locations)
  scale_color_discrete(name = "Cropping System")  #legend for colors
# save figures/forage/ALFforage_Nrate_yr3S.jpeg  775x630

#Threeway means
NZSA1emm <- compute_emmeansNZS("modNZSA1")
#write.csv(NZSA1emm, 'data/Final_Data/NZSA1emm.csv')

#Alf forage E plot (ZS)
NZSAemmsP <- emmeans(modNZSA1, ~ P, type = "response") 
emms_df <- as.data.frame(NZSAemmsP)
cld_dataNZSAP <- cld(NZSAemmsP, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataNZSAP)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("P"))
AZSE<-ggplot(NdZSA, aes(x = P, y = exp(predicted))) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 3, alpha = 0.7, color="darkgreen") +
  labs(x = "Environment", y = "Alfalfa Forage Yield") +
  geom_point(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, y = response), 
             size = 4, shape = 18, color = "black")+ 
  geom_errorbar(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), 
                width = 0.2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = response.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = 0, hjust = 1.8)
print(AZSE)
#ggsave("figures/forage/AZSE.jpg", plot = AZSE, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)







#Pairwise N
emmsN <- emmeans(modNYFA1, ~ N,at = list(N = N_levels), type= "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means
cld_dataNYFAN <- cld(emmsN, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
#Pairwise N:C
emmsNC <- emmeans(modNYFA1, ~ N*CROP,at = list(N = N_levels), type= "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means
cld_dataNYFANC <- cld(emmsNC, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
cld_dataNYFANC$response <- format(cld_dataNYFANC$response, digits = 5)
rownames(cld_dataNYFANC) <- NULL

  select(N,CROP, response, .group)
colnames(cld_dataNYFANC) <- c("N","Cropping System","ALF Forage (kg ha-1)", "Group")
cld_dataNYFANC  |> 
  data.frame() |> 
  kbl(align = "c") |> 
  kable_paper(full_width = F) |> 
  column_spec(1, bold = T)

#slope stuff
emtrends_result<-emtrends(modNYFA1,~ CROP, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
  emtrends_df <- as.data.frame(emtrends_result)
  desired_order_C <- c("intercrop", "monoculture")
  emtrends_df$CROP <- factor(emtrends_df$CROP, levels = desired_order_C)
  #view(emtrends_df)
  
  #equations table
emtrends_result<-emtrends(modNYFA1,~ CROP, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
emtrends_df <- as.data.frame(emtrends_result)
emmeans_results<-emmeans(modNYFA1, ~CROP, at=list(N=0))
emmeans_df <- as.data.frame(emmeans_results)
merged_df <- emtrends_df %>%
  inner_join(emmeans_df, by = c( "CROP")) %>%
  select(CROP, emmean, N.trend, SE.x)
#view(merged_df)
merged_df$CROP <- factor(merged_df$CROP, levels = c("intercrop", "monoculture"))  # Preferred order for CROP
# Create a new data frame with the calculated column
new_df <- merged_df %>%
  mutate(equation = sprintf("=%.2f*e(%.4fN)", exp(emmean), N.trend),  SE.x = sprintf("%.4f", SE.x),  percent_change = sprintf("%.2f%%", (exp(N.trend) - 1) * 100))%>%
  select(-emmean, -N.trend)
sorted_df <- new_df %>%
  arrange( CROP)
#view(sorted_df)
```

#Alf forage year 3 fall
```{r}
#LINEAR
modNZFA<-lmer(PlotAlfDryKgHa~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdZFA)
anova(modNZFA)
#Check assumptions
NZFA_resid<-resid(modNZFA)
qqnorm(NZFA_resid)
qqline(NZFA_resid)
plot(NZFA_resid)
#log transform 
modNZFA1<-lmer(log(PlotAlfDryKgHa+0.0001)~N*P*CROP + (1|Rep), data=NdZFA)
anova(modNZFA1)
#Check assumptions
NZFA1_resid<-resid(modNZFA1)
qqnorm(NZFA1_resid)
qqline(NZFA1_resid)
plot(modNZFA1)
# normal is much better, but does not have E:C as significant which log does

modNZFA1_summary <- summary(modNZFA1)
modNZFA1_coeff <- as.data.frame(modNZFA1_summary$coefficients)%>%
  filter(`Pr(>|t|)` < 0.05)
# Create custom table using kable and kableExtra
save_kable(
  knitr::kable(modNZFA1_coeff, 
               caption = "Y3 Fall Mixed-Effects Model: log(PlotAlfDryKgHa) ~ Nrate * Location * CROPsystem + (1 | Rep)") %>%
    kable_styling(full_width = TRUE, 
                  position = "center", 
                  bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed")),
  file = "figures/forage/ALF_table_significant_coeff_yr3F.html")
# ALF_table_significant_coeff_yr3F

max(NdZFA$PlotAlfDryKgHa)
#LINEAR plots
NdZFA$predicted <- predict(modNZFA1, newdata = NdZFA, re.form = NA)
ggplot(NdZFA, aes(x = N, y = PlotAlfDryKgHa, color = CROP, group= CROP)) +
    geom_point() + geom_line(aes(N, exp(predicted)))+ #regression through backtransformed predicted values
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg/ha)", y = "Alf Forage Yield (Kg/ha)") +  # Label the axes
  ggtitle("Yr 3 F Relationship between Alf Forage Yield and N-rate") +  # Add a title
scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160))+ #fix x axis scale
  facet_wrap(~P, scales = "free_y",ncol=2)+ #make it by location (remove to make it across locations)
  scale_color_discrete(name = "Cropping System")  #legend for colors
# save figures/forage/ALFforage_Nrate_yr3F.jpeg  775x630

#Threeway means
NZFA1emm <- compute_emmeansNZF("modNZFA1")
#write.csv(NZFA1emm, 'data/Final_Data/NZFA1emm.csv')

#Alf forage figure E:C (ZF)
ZFAemmsPC <- emmeans(modNZFA1, ~ P*CROP, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means (excluding N)
emms_df <- as.data.frame(ZFAemmsPC)
cld_dataZFAPC <- cld(ZFAemmsPC, Letters=custom_letters)
cld_df <-as.data.frame(cld_dataZFAPC)
merged_df <- merge(emms_df, cld_df,by = c("P", "CROP"))
custom_labels <- c("Intercrop", "Monoculture Alfalfa")
custom_colors <- c("darkmagenta", "coral1") 
AZFPC<-ggplot(NdZFA, aes(x = P, y = exp(predicted), color = CROP)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(x = "Environment", y = "Alfalfa Forage Yield") +
  geom_point(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, y = response), 
             size = 4, shape = 18, color = "black")+ 
  geom_errorbar(data = emms_df, aes(x = P, ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), 
                width = 0.2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = merged_df, aes(x = P, y = response.x, label = .group), 
            color = "black", vjust = 0, hjust = 2)+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Cropping System", labels = custom_labels,values = custom_colors)+
     ggtitle("Year 3 Fall")+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))#+
#  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(1000, 3000, 5000, 7000,9000), limits = c(0, 4000))
print(AZFPC)
#ggsave("figures/forage/AZFPC.jpg", plot = AZFPC, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)





#Pairwise N
emmsN <- emmeans(modNZFA1, ~ N,at = list(N = N_levels), type= "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means
cld_dataNZFAN <- cld(emmsN, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
#Pairwise N:C
emmsNC <- emmeans(modNZFA1, ~ N*CROP,at = list(N = N_levels), type= "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means
cld_dataNZFANC <- cld(emmsNC, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
cld_dataNZFANC$response <- format(cld_dataNZFANC$response, digits = 5)
rownames(cld_dataNZFANC) <- NULL
cld_dataNZFANC<- cld_dataNZFANC %>%
  select(N,CROP, response, .group)
colnames(cld_dataNZFANC) <- c("N","Cropping System","ALF Forage (kg ha-1)", "Group")
cld_dataNZFANC  |> 
  data.frame() |> 
  kbl(align = "c") |> 
  kable_paper(full_width = F) |> 
  column_spec(1, bold = T)

#slope stuff
emtrends_result<-emtrends(modNZFA1,~ CROP, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
  emtrends_df <- as.data.frame(emtrends_result)
  desired_order_C <- c("intercrop", "monoculture")
  emtrends_df$CROP <- factor(emtrends_df$CROP, levels = desired_order_C)
  #view(emtrends_df)
  
  #equations table
emtrends_result<-emtrends(modNZFA1,~ CROP, var= "N", infer=TRUE)
emtrends_df <- as.data.frame(emtrends_result)
emmeans_results<-emmeans(modNZFA1, ~CROP, at=list(N=0))
emmeans_df <- as.data.frame(emmeans_results)
merged_df <- emtrends_df %>%
  inner_join(emmeans_df, by = c( "CROP")) %>%
  select(CROP, emmean, N.trend, SE.x)
#view(merged_df)
merged_df$CROP <- factor(merged_df$CROP, levels = c("intercrop", "monoculture"))  # Preferred order for CROP
# Create a new data frame with the calculated column
new_df <- merged_df %>%
  mutate(equation = sprintf("=%.2f*e(%.4fN)", exp(emmean), N.trend),  SE.x = sprintf("%.4f", SE.x),  percent_change = sprintf("%.2f%%", (exp(N.trend) - 1) * 100))%>%
  select(-emmean, -N.trend)
sorted_df <- new_df %>%
  arrange( CROP)
#view(sorted_df)
```


# Alf Forage anovas Table 
```{r}
aov.tableXS <- anova(modNXSA1)
tableAFXS = flextable(data = aov.tableXS %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column(" ")) 
print(tableAFXS)
# save figures/forage/gt_AFXS 

aov.tableXF <- anova(modNXFA1)
tableAFXF = flextable(data = aov.tableXF %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column(" ")) 
print(tableAFXF)
# save figures/forage/gt_AFXF

aov.tableYS <- anova(modNYSA1) 
tableAFYS = flextable(data = aov.tableYS %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column(" ")) 
print(tableAFYS)
# save figures/forage/gt_AFYS 

aov.tableYF <- anova(modNYFA1)
tableAFYF = flextable(data = aov.tableYF %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column(" ")) 
print(tableAFYF)
# save figures/forage/gt_AFYF

aov.tableZS <- anova(modNZSA1)
tableAFZS = flextable(data = aov.tableZS %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column(" ")) 
print(tableAFZS)
# save figures/forage/gt_AFZS 

aov.tableZF <- anova(modNZFA1)
tableAFZF = flextable(data = aov.tableZF %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column(" ")) 
print(tableAFZF)
# save figures/forage/gt_AFZF


my_modelsNG <- list(modNXSA1, modNXFA1, modNYSA1, modNYFA1, modNZSA1, modNZFA1)
anovasNG <- purrr::map(my_modelsNG, ~anova(.))
names(anovasNG) <- c("Year 1 S", "Year 1 F", "Year 2 S", "Year 2 F", "Year 3 S", "Year 3 F")

# Function to format p-values as stars
format_p_value <- function(p_val) {
  stars <- ifelse(p_val < 0.001, "***", ifelse(p_val < 0.01, "**", ifelse(p_val < 0.05, "*", "")))
  return(stars)
}

# Apply the function to your ANOVA results
NG_stars_tibble <- map(anovasNG, as_tibble, rownames="term") %>%
  bind_rows(.id = "model") %>%
  mutate(stars = map_chr(`Pr(>F)`, format_p_value))

NG_stars_tibble <- NG_stars_tibble %>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "P", "E", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "N:P", "N:E", term))%>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "P:CROP", "E:CROP", term))%>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "N:P:CROP", "N:E:CROP", term))%>%
  filter(term != "Residuals")

# Print the tibble
print(NG_stars_tibble)

NG_stars <-NG_stars_tibble |> 
  select(model, term, stars) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = term, values_from = stars)

gt_NG <- gt(NG_stars)

gt_NG |> gtsave("figures/forage/gt_AF.png", expand = 10)
```

#Alf forage plots N:C 
```{r}
# Layer all the plots together!
colors <- c("Year 1 Summer Harvest" = "red", 
            "Year 1 Fall Harvest" = "green", 
            "Year 2 Summer Harvest" = "blue", 
            "Year 2 Fall Harvest" = "purple", 
            "Year 3 Summer Harvest" = "orange")
legend_order <- c("Year 1 Summer Harvest", "Year 1 Fall Harvest",
                  "Year 2 Summer Harvest", "Year 2 Fall Harvest",
                  "Year 3 Summer Harvest")
desired_order <- c("MN", "NY", "KS", "WI")
NdXSA$P <- factor(NdXSA$P, levels = desired_order)
NdYSA$P <- factor(NdYSA$P, levels = desired_order)
NdZSA$P <- factor(NdZSA$P, levels = desired_order)

max(NdXSA$PlotAlfDryKgHa)
max(NdXFA$PlotAlfDryKgHa)
max(NdYSA$PlotAlfDryKgHa)
max(NdYFA$PlotAlfDryKgHa)
max(NdZSA$PlotAlfDryKgHa)

AFcomboplotNC <- ggplot() +
  geom_line(data = NdXSA, aes(N, exp(predicted), color = "Year 1 Summer Harvest", linetype= CROP)) +
  geom_point(data = NdXSA, aes(x = N, y = PlotAlfDryKgHa, color = "Year 1 Summer Harvest", shape= CROP)) +
  geom_line(data = NdXFA, aes(N, exp(predicted), color = "Year 1 Fall Harvest", linetype= CROP)) +
  geom_point(data = NdXFA, aes(x = N, y = PlotAlfDryKgHa, color = "Year 1 Fall Harvest", shape= CROP)) +
  geom_line(data = NdYSA, aes(N, exp(predicted), color = "Year 2 Summer Harvest", linetype= CROP)) +
  geom_point(data = NdYSA, aes(x = N, y = PlotAlfDryKgHa, color = "Year 2 Summer Harvest", shape= CROP)) +
  geom_line(data = NdYFA, aes(N, exp(predicted), color = "Year 2 Fall Harvest", linetype= CROP)) +
  geom_point(data = NdYFA, aes(x = N, y = PlotAlfDryKgHa, color = "Year 2 Fall Harvest", shape= CROP)) +
  geom_line(data = NdZSA, aes(N, exp(predicted), color = "Year 3 Summer Harvest", linetype= CROP)) +
  geom_point(data = NdZSA, aes(x = N, y = PlotAlfDryKgHa, color = "Year 3 Summer Harvest", shape= CROP)) +
  geom_line(data = NdZFA, aes(N, exp(predicted), color = "Year 3 Fall Harvest", linetype= CROP)) +
  geom_point(data = NdZFA, aes(x = N, y = PlotAlfDryKgHa, color = "Year 3 Fall Harvest", shape= CROP)) +
  labs(x = "N-Rate (kg ha-1)", y = "Alfalfa Forage Yield",
       color = "Harvest", 
       linetype = "Cropping System", shape = "Cropping System") +
  ggtitle("Relationship Between Alfalfa Forage Yield and N-rate") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160)) +
  ylim(0, 10000) +
  facet_wrap(~P, scales = "free", ncol = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors, limits = legend_order)+
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(4, 20, 25),labels = c("Intercropped", "Monoculture Alfalfa") )+
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("inter" = "solid", "monoA" = "dotted"),labels = c("Intercropped", "Monoculture Alfalfa"))
print(AFcomboplotNC)
#ggsave("figures/forage/AFcomboplotNC.jpg", plot = AFcomboplotNC, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```


## Proportion of species in Total Forage Yield
From Megan: values and analysis of proportion of each species in total forage yield for intercropped plots. Not proportional partial LER, but just proportion of normal yields in the total. The code for PrPLER should be helpful to run that analysis though! You’ll just want to make sure there isn’t a C factor since we’re only looking at one cropping system and that you’re only pulling intercropped plot yields.


# proportion of species in Total Forage Yield of intercropped plots calculations
```{r}
# Year 1 S - proportion of species in total forage intercropped plots
NdXSPrIA <- NdXS %>%
  filter(Intercropped == "y")%>%
  group_by(N, P, Plot, Rep) %>%
  reframe(
    PropIWG = (PlotIWGDryKgHa) / (PlotTotForageKgHa), 
    PropALF = (PlotAlfDryKgHa) / (PlotTotForageKgHa), 
    Tot = (PropIWG + PropALF)
  )
# Year 1 F - proportion of species in total forage intercropped plots
NdXFPrIA <- NdXF %>%
  filter(Intercropped == "y")%>%
  group_by(N, P, Plot, Rep) %>%
  reframe(
    PropIWG = (PlotIWGDryKgHa) / (PlotTotForageKgHa), 
    PropALF = (PlotAlfDryKgHa) / (PlotTotForageKgHa), 
    Tot = (PropIWG + PropALF)
  )
# Year 2 S - proportion of species in total forage intercropped plots
NdYSPrIA <- NdYS %>%
  filter(Intercropped == "y")%>%
  group_by(N, P, Plot, Rep) %>%
  reframe(
    PropIWG = (PlotIWGDryKgHa) / (PlotTotForageKgHa), 
    PropALF = (PlotAlfDryKgHa) / (PlotTotForageKgHa), 
    Tot = (PropIWG + PropALF)
  )
# Year 2 F - proportion of species in total forage intercropped plots
NdYFPrIA <- NdYF %>%
  filter(Intercropped == "y")%>%
  group_by(N, P, Plot, Rep) %>%
  reframe(
    PropIWG = (PlotIWGDryKgHa) / (PlotTotForageKgHa), 
    PropALF = (PlotAlfDryKgHa) / (PlotTotForageKgHa), 
    Tot = (PropIWG + PropALF)
  )
# Year 3 S - proportion of species in total forage intercropped plots
NdZSPrIA <- NdZS %>%
  filter(Intercropped == "y")%>%
  group_by(N, P, Plot, Rep) %>%
  reframe(
    PropIWG = (PlotIWGDryKgHa) / (PlotTotForageKgHa), 
    PropALF = (PlotAlfDryKgHa) / (PlotTotForageKgHa), 
    Tot = (PropIWG + PropALF)
  )
# Year 3 F - proportion of species in total forage intercropped plots
NdZFPrIA <- NdZF %>%
  filter(Intercropped == "y")%>%
  filter(!is.na(PlotIWGDryKgHa), !is.na(PlotAlfDryKgHa)) %>%   # drop rows where either forage amount is NA
  group_by(N, P, Plot, Rep) %>%
  reframe(
    PropIWG = (PlotIWGDryKgHa) / (PlotTotForageKgHa), 
    PropALF = (PlotAlfDryKgHa) / (PlotTotForageKgHa), 
    Tot = (PropIWG + PropALF)
  )
```

# Species Proportions Year 1 S
```{r}
# Proportion IWG in total forage XS
#model by nrate XS
modIPrIAXS<-lmer(PropIWG~N*P + (1|Rep), data = NdXSPrIA )
anova(modIPrIAXS)
#check assumptions 
IPrIAXS_resid<-resid(modIPrIAXS)
qqnorm(IPrIAXS_resid)
qqline(IPrIAXS_resid)
plot(modIPrIAXS)
#Logtransform
modIPrIAXS1<-lmer(log(PropIWG)~N*P + (1|Rep), data = NdXSPrIA )
anova(modIPrIAXS1)
#check assumptions 
IPrIAXS_resid1<-resid(modIPrIAXS1)
qqnorm(IPrIAXS_resid1)
qqline(IPrIAXS_resid1)
plot(modIPrIAXS1)
# normal looks better, but log has added sig of N:P

# Proportion Alf in total forage XS
#model by nrate XS
modAPrIAXS<-lmer(PropALF~N*P + (1|Rep), data = NdXSPrIA )
anova(modAPrIAXS)
#check assumptions 
APrIAXS_resid<-resid(modAPrIAXS)
qqnorm(APrIAXS_resid)
qqline(APrIAXS_resid)
plot(modAPrIAXS)
#Logtransform
modAPrIAXS1<-lmer(log(PropALF)~N*P + (1|Rep), data = NdXSPrIA )
anova(modAPrIAXS1)
#check assumptions 
APrIAXS_resid1<-resid(modAPrIAXS1)
qqnorm(APrIAXS_resid1)
qqline(APrIAXS_resid1)
plot(modAPrIAXS1)
# normal looks better, but same significances

# manipulate into long format
NdXSPrIA_long <- NdXSPrIA %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("Prop"),
               names_to = "Species",
               values_to = "Prop")
# get mean proportion of each species at a given N within a P
NdXSPrIA_long2 <- NdXSPrIA_long %>%
  dplyr::group_by(P, N, Species) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(meanProp = mean(Prop),
                   Tot = first(Tot),
                   .groups = "drop")%>%
  mutate(N = factor(N))%>%
  mutate(Species = factor(Species, levels = c("PropIWG", "PropALF")))

PrIAXSplot <- ggplot(NdXSPrIA_long2, aes(x = N, y = meanProp, fill = Species)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack")+
  facet_wrap(~P, ncol = 2) +
  labs(y = "Proportion Species", x = "N Rate") +
  scale_fill_discrete(name = "Species",
  labels = c(PropALF = "Alfalfa", PropIWG = "IWG"))+
  ggtitle("Average Proportion of IWG and Alfalfa from Intercrop Plots, Year 1 Summer")
# save figures/forage/PrIAXSplot    1022x884

# pairwise comparisons between N rates
NdXSPrIA$N <- factor(NdXSPrIA$N)
modIPrIAXS1 <- update(modIPrIAXS1)
emmsN <- emmeans(modIPrIAXS1, pairwise ~ N|P) 
cld_dataIPrIAXS1 <- cld(emmsN, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
cld_dataIPrIAXS1$response <- format(cld_dataIPrIAXS1$response, digits = 5)
rownames(cld_dataIPrIAXS1) <- NULL
cld_dataIPrIAXS1<- cld_dataIPrIAXS1 %>%
  select(N, P, SE, lower.CL, upper.CL, .group)
cld_dataIPrIAXS1  |> 
  data.frame() |> 
  kbl(align = "c") |> 
  kable_paper(full_width = F) |> 
  column_spec(1, bold = T)
# save figures/forage/Pr_table_Nrate_IXS  430x245
modAPrIAXS1 <- update(modAPrIAXS1)
emmsN <- emmeans(modAPrIAXS1, pairwise ~ N) 
cld_dataAPrIAXS1 <- cld(emmsN, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
cld_dataAPrIAXS1$response <- format(cld_dataAPrIAXS1$response, digits = 5)
rownames(cld_dataAPrIAXS1) <- NULL
cld_dataAPrIAXS1<- cld_dataAPrIAXS1 %>%
  select(N, SE, lower.CL, upper.CL, .group)
cld_dataAPrIAXS1  |> 
  data.frame() |> 
  kbl(align = "c") |> 
  kable_paper(full_width = F) |> 
  column_spec(1, bold = T)
# save figures/forage/Pr_table_Nrate_AXS  430x245
```

# Species Proportions Year 1 F
```{r}

# manipulate into long format

  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("Prop"),
               names_to = "Species",
               values_to = "Prop")
# get mean proportion of each species at a given N within a P
NdXFPrIA_long2 <- NdXFPrIA_long %>%
  dplyr::group_by(P, N, Species) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(meanProp = mean(Prop),
                   Tot = first(Tot),
                   .groups = "drop")%>%
  mutate(N = factor(N))%>%
  mutate(Species = factor(Species, levels = c("PropIWG", "PropALF")))

PrIAXFplot <- ggplot(NdXFPrIA_long2, aes(x = N, y = meanProp, fill = Species)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack")+
  facet_wrap(~P, ncol = 2) +

  scale_fill_discrete(name = "Species",
  labels = c(PropALF = "Alfalfa", PropIWG = "IWG"))+
  ggtitle("Average Proportion of IWG and Alfalfa from Intercrop Plots, Year 1 Fall")
# save figures/forage/PrIAXFplot    1022x884

rownames(cld_dataIPrIAXF1) <- NULL
cld_dataIPrIAXF1<- cld_dataIPrIAXF1 %>%
  select(N, SE, lower.CL, upper.CL, .group)
cld_dataIPrIAXF1  |> 
  data.frame() |> 
  kbl(align = "c") |> 
  kable_paper(full_width = F) |> 
  column_spec(1, bold = T)
# save figures/forage/Pr_table_Nrate_IXF  430x245
```

```{r}
qqline(IPrIAZS_resid1)

# Proportion Alf in total forage ZS

# manipulate into long format
```

# Species Proportions anovas Table 
```{r}
aov.tableIXS <- anova(modIPrIAXS1)
tablePrIXS = flextable(data = aov.tableIXS %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column(" ")) 
print(tablePrIXS)
# save figures/forage/gt_PrIXS 

aov.tableAXS <- anova(modAPrIAXS1)
tablePrAXS = flextable(data = aov.tableAXS %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column(" ")) 
print(tablePrAXS)
# save figures/forage/gt_PrAXS 

aov.tableIXF <- anova(modIPrIAXF1)
tablePrIXF = flextable(data = aov.tableIXF %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column(" ")) 
print(tablePrIXF)
# save figures/forage/gt_PrIXF 

aov.tableAXF <- anova(modAPrIAXF1)
tablePrAXF = flextable(data = aov.tableAXF %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column(" ")) 
print(tablePrAXF)
# save figures/forage/gt_PrAXF 

aov.tableIYS <- anova(modIPrIAYS1)
tablePrIYS = flextable(data = aov.tableIYS %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column(" ")) 
print(tablePrIYS)
# save figures/forage/gt_PrIYS 

aov.tableAYS <- anova(modAPrIAYS1)
tablePrAYS = flextable(data = aov.tableAYS %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column(" ")) 
print(tablePrAYS)
# save figures/forage/gt_PrAYS 

aov.tableIYF <- anova(modIPrIAYF1)
tablePrIYF = flextable(data = aov.tableIYF %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column(" ")) 
print(tablePrIYF)
# save figures/forage/gt_PrIYF 

aov.tableAYF <- anova(modAPrIAYF1)
tablePrAYF = flextable(data = aov.tableAYF %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column(" ")) 
print(tablePrAYF)
# save figures/forage/gt_PrAYF

aov.tableIZS <- anova(modIPrIAZS1)
tablePrIZS = flextable(data = aov.tableIZS %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column(" ")) 
print(tablePrIZS)
# save figures/forage/gt_PrIZS 

aov.tableAZS <- anova(modAPrIAZS1)
tablePrAZS = flextable(data = aov.tableAZS %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column(" ")) 
print(tablePrAZS)
# save figures/forage/gt_PrAZS 

aov.tableIZF <- anova(modIPrIAZF1)
tablePrIZF = flextable(data = aov.tableIZF %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column(" ")) 
print(tablePrIZF)
# save figures/forage/gt_PrIZF 

aov.tableAZF <- anova(modAPrIAZF1)
tablePrAZF = flextable(data = aov.tableAZF %>%
                    #filter(`Pr(>F)` < 0.05) %>%
                    mutate(`Pr(>F)` = formatC(`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3)) %>% 
                    select(`Pr(>F)`) %>%
                    rownames_to_column(" ")) 
print(tablePrAZF)
# save figures/forage/gt_PrAZF

my_modelsNG <- list(modIPrIAXS1, modAPrIAXS1, modIPrIAXF1, modAPrIAXF1, modIPrIAYS1, modAPrIAYS1, modIPrIAYF1, modAPrIAYF1, modIPrIAZS1, modAPrIAZS1, modIPrIAZF1, modAPrIAZF1)
anovasNG <- purrr::map(my_modelsNG, ~anova(.))
names(anovasNG) <- c("IWG Pr Year 1 S", "ALF Pr Year 1 S", "IWG Pr Year 1 F", "ALF Pr Year 1 F", "IWG Pr Year 2 S", "ALF Pr Year 2 S", "IWG Pr Year 2 F", "ALF Pr Year 2 F", "IWG Pr Year 3 S", "ALF Pr Year 3 S", "IWG Pr Year 3 F", "ALF Pr Year 3 F")

# Function to format p-values as stars
format_p_value <- function(p_val) {
  stars <- ifelse(p_val < 0.001, "***", ifelse(p_val < 0.01, "**", ifelse(p_val < 0.05, "*", "")))
  return(stars)
}

# Apply the function to your ANOVA results
NG_stars_tibble <- map(anovasNG, as_tibble, rownames="term") %>%
  bind_rows(.id = "model") %>%
  mutate(stars = map_chr(`Pr(>F)`, format_p_value))

NG_stars_tibble <- NG_stars_tibble %>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "P", "E", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "N:P", "N:E", term))%>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "P:CROP", "E:CROP", term))%>%
  mutate(term = ifelse(term == "N:P:CROP", "N:E:CROP", term))%>%
  filter(term != "Residuals")

# Print the tibble
print(NG_stars_tibble)

NG_stars <-NG_stars_tibble |> 
  select(model, term, stars) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = term, values_from = stars)

gt_NG <- gt(NG_stars)

gt_NG |> gtsave("figures/forage/gt_PrIA.png", expand = 10)
```



## LER

# LER calculations 
```{r}
# Nd SW 0 
#IWG partial LER 
NdSW0IWGLER <- Nd %>%
  group_by(Rep, P, YearCode, Harvest) %>%
  reframe(
    PartialLERIWGSW0 = (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 10]) / (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 5])
  )
#Alf partial LER 
NdSW0ALFLER <- Nd %>%
  group_by(Rep, P, YearCode, Harvest) %>%
  reframe(
    PartialLERAlfSW0 = (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 10]) / (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 15])
  )
#Total LER 
NdSW0TotalLER <- Nd %>%
  group_by(Rep, P, YearCode, Harvest) %>%
  reframe(
    TotalLERSW0 = (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 10]) / (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 5]) + (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 10]) / (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 15])
  ) 
#Join together first two tables
LERresults1<-left_join(NdSW0IWGLER, NdSW0ALFLER, by = c("Rep", "P", "YearCode", "Harvest"))
#join together new joined table and third table 
LERresultsNdSW0<-left_join(LERresults1, NdSW0TotalLER, by = c("Rep", "P", "YearCode", "Harvest"))

# Nd SW 40 
#IWG partial LER 
NdSW40IWGLER <- Nd %>%
  group_by(Rep, P, YearCode, Harvest) %>%
  reframe(
    PartialLERIWGSW40 = (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 11]) / (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 6])
  )
#Alf partial LER 
NdSW40ALFLER <- Nd %>%
  group_by(Rep, P, YearCode, Harvest) %>%
  reframe(
    PartialLERAlfSW40 = (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 11]) / (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 16])
  )
#Total LER 
NdSW40TotalLER <- Nd %>%
  group_by(Rep, P, YearCode, Harvest) %>%
  reframe(
    TotalLERSW40 = (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 11]) / (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 6]) + (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 11]) / (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 16])
  ) 
#Join together first two tables
LERresults2<-left_join(NdSW40IWGLER, NdSW40ALFLER, by = c("Rep", "P", "YearCode", "Harvest"))
#join together new joined table and third table 
LERresultsNdSW40<-left_join(LERresults2, NdSW40TotalLER, by = c("Rep", "P", "YearCode", "Harvest"))

#Nd SW 80
#IWG partial LER 
NdSW80IWGLER <- Nd %>%
  group_by(Rep, P, YearCode, Harvest) %>%
  reframe(
    PartialLERIWGSW80 = (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 12]) / (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 7])
  )
#Alf partial LER 
NdSW80ALFLER <- Nd %>%
  group_by(Rep, P, YearCode, Harvest) %>%
  reframe(
    PartialLERAlfSW80 = (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 12]) / (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 17])
  )
#Total LER 
NdSW80TotalLER <- Nd %>%
  group_by(Rep, P, YearCode, Harvest) %>%
  reframe(
    TotalLERSW80 = (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 12]) / (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 7]) + (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 12]) / (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 17])
  ) 
#Join together first two tables
LERresults3<-left_join(NdSW80IWGLER, NdSW80ALFLER, by = c("Rep", "P", "YearCode", "Harvest"))
#join together new joined table and third table 
LERresultsNdSW80<-left_join(LERresults3, NdSW80TotalLER, by = c("Rep", "P", "YearCode", "Harvest"))

#Nd SW 120
#IWG partial LER 
NdSW120IWGLER <- Nd %>%
  group_by(Rep, P, YearCode, Harvest) %>%
  reframe(
    PartialLERIWGSW120 = (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 13]) / (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 8])
  )
#Alf partial LER 
NdSW120ALFLER <- Nd %>%
  group_by(Rep, P, YearCode, Harvest) %>%
  reframe(
    PartialLERAlfSW120 = (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 13]) / (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 18])
  )
#Total LER 
NdSW120TotalLER <- Nd %>%
  group_by(Rep, P, YearCode, Harvest) %>%
  reframe(
    TotalLERSW120 = (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 13]) / (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 8]) + (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 13]) / (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 18])
  ) 
#Join together first two tables
LERresults4<-left_join(NdSW120IWGLER, NdSW120ALFLER, by = c("Rep", "P", "YearCode", "Harvest"))
#join together new joined table and third table 
LERresultsNdSW120<-left_join(LERresults4, NdSW120TotalLER, by = c("Rep", "P", "YearCode", "Harvest"))

#Nd SW 160
#IWG partial LER 
NdSW160IWGLER <- Nd %>%
  group_by(Rep, P, YearCode, Harvest) %>%
  reframe(
    PartialLERIWGSW160= (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 14]) / (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 9])
  )
#Alf partial LER 
NdSW160ALFLER <- Nd %>%
  group_by(Rep, P, YearCode, Harvest) %>%
  reframe(
    PartialLERAlfSW160 = (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 14]) / (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 19])
  )
#Total LER 
NdSW160TotalLER <- Nd %>%
  group_by(Rep, P, YearCode, Harvest) %>%
  reframe(
    TotalLERSW160 = (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 14]) / (PlotIWGDryKgHa[Treatment == 9]) + (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 14]) / (PlotAlfDryKgHa[Treatment == 19])
  ) 
#Join together first two tables
LERresults5<-left_join(NdSW160IWGLER, NdSW160ALFLER, by = c("Rep", "P", "YearCode", "Harvest"))
#join together new joined table and third table 
LERresultsNdSW160<-left_join(LERresults5, NdSW160TotalLER, by = c("Rep", "P", "YearCode", "Harvest"))

#merge all LER results into one data frame
LERresults6<-left_join(LERresultsNdSW0, LERresultsNdSW40, by = c("Rep", "P", "YearCode", "Harvest"))
LERresults7<-left_join(LERresults6, LERresultsNdSW80, by = c("Rep", "P", "YearCode", "Harvest"))
LERresults8<-left_join(LERresults7, LERresultsNdSW120, by = c("Rep", "P", "YearCode", "Harvest"))
LERresultsNdSWALL<-left_join(LERresults8, LERresultsNdSW160, by = c("Rep", "P", "YearCode", "Harvest"))

#Rearrange dataframe
LERresultsNdSWALL_long <- LERresultsNdSWALL %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("PartialLER") | starts_with("TotalLER"),
               names_to = "Nrate",
               values_to = "LER")

#try to make the dataframe more usable

#cut off total and partial 
LERresultsNdSWALL_long$Type <- sub("^(Partial|Total)", "", LERresultsNdSWALL_long$Nrate)
LERresultsNdSWALL_long$tot_or_part <- sub("^(Partial|Total).*", "\\1", LERresultsNdSWALL_long$Nrate)

#cut off LERIWGSW and LERAlfSW and LERSW
LERresultsNdSWALL_long$NRATE <- sub("^(LERIWGSW|LERAlfSW|LERSW)", "", LERresultsNdSWALL_long$Type)
LERresultsNdSWALL_long$PlotType <- sub("^(LERIWGSW|LERAlfSW|LERSW).*", "\\1", LERresultsNdSWALL_long$Type)

#get rid of pesky NA results (caused by missing plots inherent in year 1 KS summer data)
LERresultsNdSWALL_longNONA<- na.omit(LERresultsNdSWALL_long)

LERresultsNdSWALL_longNONA$NRATE<-as.numeric(LERresultsNdSWALL_longNONA$NRATE)

#includes total and partial until it doesn't...used for some pairwise comparison thingy. 
LERResultsAllX<-LERresultsNdSWALL_longNONA[LERresultsNdSWALL_longNONA$YearCode == 'X',]
LERResultsAllY<-LERresultsNdSWALL_longNONA[LERresultsNdSWALL_longNONA$YearCode == 'Y',]
LERResultsAllZ<-LERresultsNdSWALL_longNONA[LERresultsNdSWALL_longNONA$YearCode == 'Z',]
LERResultsAllXS<-LERResultsAllX[LERResultsAllX$Harvest == 'Summer',]
  LERResultsTotXS<-LERResultsAllXS[LERResultsAllXS$tot_or_part == 'Total',]
  LERResultsPartIWGXS<-LERResultsAllXS[LERResultsAllXS$tot_or_part == 'Partial' & LERResultsAllXS$PlotType == 'LERIWGSW' ,]
  LERResultsPartAlfXS<-LERResultsAllXS[LERResultsAllXS$tot_or_part == 'Partial' & LERResultsAllXS$PlotType == 'LERAlfSW' ,]
LERResultsAllXF<-LERResultsAllX[LERResultsAllX$Harvest == 'Fall',]
  LERResultsTotXF<-LERResultsAllXF[LERResultsAllXF$tot_or_part == 'Total',]
  LERResultsPartIWGXF<-LERResultsAllXF[LERResultsAllXF$tot_or_part == 'Partial' & LERResultsAllXF$PlotType == 'LERIWGSW' ,]
  LERResultsPartAlfXF<-LERResultsAllXF[LERResultsAllXF$tot_or_part == 'Partial' & LERResultsAllXF$PlotType == 'LERAlfSW' ,]
LERResultsAllYS<-LERResultsAllY[LERResultsAllY$Harvest == 'Summer',]
  LERResultsTotYS<-LERResultsAllYS[LERResultsAllYS$tot_or_part == 'Total',]
  LERResultsPartIWGYS<-LERResultsAllYS[LERResultsAllYS$tot_or_part == 'Partial' & LERResultsAllYS$PlotType == 'LERIWGSW' ,]
  LERResultsPartAlfYS<-LERResultsAllYS[LERResultsAllYS$tot_or_part == 'Partial' & LERResultsAllYS$PlotType == 'LERAlfSW' ,]
LERResultsAllYF<-LERResultsAllY[LERResultsAllY$Harvest == 'Fall',]
  LERResultsTotYF<-LERResultsAllYF[LERResultsAllYF$tot_or_part == 'Total',]
  LERResultsPartIWGYF<-LERResultsAllYF[LERResultsAllYF$tot_or_part == 'Partial' & LERResultsAllYF$PlotType == 'LERIWGSW' ,]
  LERResultsPartAlfYF<-LERResultsAllYF[LERResultsAllYF$tot_or_part == 'Partial' & LERResultsAllYF$PlotType == 'LERAlfSW' ,]
LERResultsAllZS<-LERResultsAllY[LERResultsAllY$Harvest == 'Summer',]
  LERResultsTotZS<-LERResultsAllZS[LERResultsAllZS$tot_or_part == 'Total',]
  LERResultsPartIWGZS<-LERResultsAllZS[LERResultsAllZS$tot_or_part == 'Partial' & LERResultsAllZS$PlotType == 'LERIWGSW' ,]
  LERResultsPartAlfZS<-LERResultsAllZS[LERResultsAllZS$tot_or_part == 'Partial' & LERResultsAllZS$PlotType == 'LERAlfSW' ,]
LERResultsAllZF<-LERResultsAllY[LERResultsAllY$Harvest == 'Fall',]
  LERResultsTotZF<-LERResultsAllZF[LERResultsAllZF$tot_or_part == 'Total',]
  LERResultsPartIWGZF<-LERResultsAllZF[LERResultsAllZF$tot_or_part == 'Partial' & LERResultsAllZF$PlotType == 'LERIWGSW' ,]
  LERResultsPartAlfZF<-LERResultsAllZF[LERResultsAllZF$tot_or_part == 'Partial' & LERResultsAllZF$PlotType == 'LERAlfSW' ,]
  
# change Inf values to NA
LERresultsNdSWALL_longNONA
LERresultsNdSWALL_longNONA['LER'][LERresultsNdSWALL_longNONA['LER'] == 'Inf'] <- NA
  
#okay now I should be able to split by total and partial
TotalLERresults<-LERresultsNdSWALL_longNONA[LERresultsNdSWALL_longNONA$tot_or_part == 'Total',]
  TotLERX<-TotalLERresults[TotalLERresults$YearCode == 'X',]
  TotLERY<-TotalLERresults[TotalLERresults$YearCode == 'Y',]
  TotLERZ<-TotalLERresults[TotalLERresults$YearCode == 'Z',]
  TotLERXS<-TotLERX[TotLERX$Harvest == 'Summer',]
  TotLERXF<-TotLERX[TotLERX$Harvest == 'Fall',]
  TotLERYS<-TotLERY[TotLERY$Harvest == 'Summer',]
  TotLERYF<-TotLERY[TotLERY$Harvest == 'Fall',]
  TotLERZS<-TotLERZ[TotLERZ$Harvest == 'Summer',]
  TotLERZF<-TotLERZ[TotLERZ$Harvest == 'Fall',]
IWGPartialLERresults<-LERresultsNdSWALL_longNONA[LERresultsNdSWALL_longNONA$PlotType == 'LERIWGSW',]
IWGPartialLERresults$NRATE<- as.numeric(IWGPartialLERresults$NRATE)
  IWGPLERX<-IWGPartialLERresults[IWGPartialLERresults$YearCode == 'X',]
  IWGPLERY<-IWGPartialLERresults[IWGPartialLERresults$YearCode == 'Y',]
  IWGPLERZ<-IWGPartialLERresults[IWGPartialLERresults$YearCode == 'Z',]
  IWGPLERXS<-IWGPLERX[IWGPLERX$Harvest == 'Summer',]
  IWGPLERXF<-IWGPLERX[IWGPLERX$Harvest == 'Fall',]
  IWGPLERYS<-IWGPLERY[IWGPLERY$Harvest == 'Summer',]
  IWGPLERYF<-IWGPLERY[IWGPLERY$Harvest == 'Fall',]
  IWGPLERZS<-IWGPLERZ[IWGPLERZ$Harvest == 'Summer',]
  IWGPLERZF<-IWGPLERZ[IWGPLERZ$Harvest == 'Fall',]
AlfPartialLERresults<-LERresultsNdSWALL_longNONA[LERresultsNdSWALL_longNONA$PlotType == 'LERAlfSW',]
AlfPartialLERresults$NRATE<- as.numeric(AlfPartialLERresults$NRATE)
  AlfPLERX<-AlfPartialLERresults[AlfPartialLERresults$YearCode == 'X',]
  AlfPLERY<-AlfPartialLERresults[AlfPartialLERresults$YearCode == 'Y',]
  AlfPLERZ<-AlfPartialLERresults[AlfPartialLERresults$YearCode == 'Z',]
  AlfPLERXS<-AlfPLERX[AlfPLERX$Harvest == 'Summer',]
  AlfPLERXF<-AlfPLERX[AlfPLERX$Harvest == 'Fall',]
  AlfPLERYS<-AlfPLERY[AlfPLERY$Harvest == 'Summer',]
  AlfPLERYF<-AlfPLERY[AlfPLERY$Harvest == 'Fall',]
  AlfPLERZS<-AlfPLERZ[AlfPLERZ$Harvest == 'Summer',]
  AlfPLERZF<-AlfPLERZ[AlfPLERZ$Harvest == 'Fall',]
  
#Check for outliers
identify_outliers(TotalLERresults[, 6]) #19 outliers 
identify_outliers(IWGPartialLERresults[, 6]) #26 outliers
identify_outliers(AlfPartialLERresults[, 6]) #4 outliers 

#rename variables in dataframes to make life easier 
# Function to add new columns to a dataframe
add_new_columns <- function(df) {
  df$N <- df$NRATE
  return(df)
}
# List of dataframes (replace these with your actual dataframes)
df_list <- list(TotLERXS, TotLERYS, TotLERZS, 
                TotLERXF, TotLERYF, TotLERZF, 
                IWGPLERXS, IWGPLERYS, IWGPLERZS, 
                IWGPLERXF, IWGPLERYF, IWGPLERZF, 
                AlfPLERXS, AlfPLERYS, AlfPLERZS,
                AlfPLERXF, AlfPLERYF, AlfPLERZF)
# Apply the function to each dataframe in the list
df_list <- lapply(df_list, add_new_columns)
# Access the modified dataframes in df_list
TotLERXS <- df_list[[1]]
TotLERYS <- df_list[[2]]
TotLERZS <- df_list[[3]]
TotLERXF <- df_list[[4]]
TotLERYF<- df_list[[5]]
TotLERZF<- df_list[[6]]
IWGPLERXS<- df_list[[7]]
IWGPLERYS<- df_list[[8]]
IWGPLERZS<- df_list[[9]]
IWGPLERXF<- df_list[[10]]
IWGPLERYF<- df_list[[11]]
IWGPLERZF<- df_list[[12]]
AlfPLERXS<- df_list[[13]]
AlfPLERYS<- df_list[[14]]
AlfPLERZS<- df_list[[15]]
AlfPLERXF<- df_list[[16]]
AlfPLERYF<- df_list[[17]]
AlfPLERZF<- df_list[[18]]
```

#Year 1 Summer Total LERs model 
```{r}
TotLERXS$N<-TotLERXS$NRATE
TotLERXS$N<- as.numeric(TotLERXS$N)
#linear
modTotLERXS<-lmer(LER~N*P + (1|Rep), data= TotLERXS)
anova(modTotLERXS)
#check assumptions 
TotLERXS_resid<-resid(modTotLERXS)
qqnorm(TotLERXS_resid)
qqline(TotLERXS_resid)
plot(modTotLERXS)
#Logtransform
modTotLERXS1<-lmer(log(LER)~N*P + (1|Rep), data=TotLERXS)
anova(modTotLERXS1)
#check assumptions logtransform (makes BETTER?)
TotLERXS_resid1<-resid(modTotLERXS1)
qqnorm(TotLERXS_resid1)
qqline(TotLERXS_resid1)
plot(modTotLERXS1)

N_levels <- c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160)

#Comparison plots
# Boxplot for Total LER
ggplot(TotLERXS, aes(x = P, y = LER, fill = as.factor(NRATE))) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(title = "XS Total LER by Location and N Rate", x = "Location", y = "Total LER")+
  geom_abline(intercept = 1, slope = 0, color = "red", linetype = "dashed")
  

# Boxplot for I Partial LER
#ggplot(IWGPLERXS, aes(x = P, y = LER, fill = as.factor(NRATE))) +
#  geom_boxplot() +
#  labs(title = "I Partial LER by Location and N Rate", x = "Location", y = "I Partial LER")+
#  geom_abline(intercept = 0.5, slope = 0, color = "red", linetype = "dashed")

# Boxplot for A Partial LER
#ggplot(AlfPLERXS, aes(x = P, y = LER, fill = as.factor(NRATE))) +
#  geom_boxplot() +
#  labs(title = "A Partial LER by Location and N Rate", x = "Location", y = "A Partial LER")+
#  geom_abline(intercept = 0.5, slope = 0, color = "red", linetype = "dashed")

#linear plots by location
TotLERXS$predicted <- predict(modTotLERXS1, newdata = TotLERXS, re.form = NA)
ggplot(TotLERXS, aes(x = N, y = LER)) +
    geom_point() + geom_line(aes(N, exp(predicted)))+ #regression through backtransformed predicted values
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg/ha)", y = "Total LER (Kg/ha)") +  # Label the axes
  ggtitle("Relationship between Total LER and N-rate") +  # Add a title
scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160))+ #fix x axis scale
  ylim(0, 2) +
  facet_wrap(~P, scales = "free_y",ncol=2)+ #make it by location (remove to make it across locations)
  scale_color_discrete(name = "Cropping System") +  #legend for colors
  geom_abline(intercept = 1, slope = 0, color = "red", linetype = "dashed")
#TWO way emmeans
TotLERXS1emm <- compute_emmeansNXS2("modTotLERXS1")
seeee<-emmeans(modTotLERXS1, ~P,at = list(N = N_levels), type= "response")
#Pairwise N 
emmsN <- emmeans(modTotLERXS1, specs = ~ N, at = list(N = N_levels), type = "response")
cld_dataNXSTLERN <- cld(emmsN, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
cld_dataNXSTLERN $response <- format(cld_dataNXSTLERN $response, digits = 3)
cld_dataNXSTLERN$lower.CL <- format(cld_dataNXSTLERN$lower.CL, digits = 3)
cld_dataNXSTLERN$upper.CL <- format(cld_dataNXSTLERN$upper.CL, digits = 3)
rownames(cld_dataNXSTLERN ) <- NULL
cld_dataNXSTLERN <- cld_dataNXSTLERN  %>%
  select( N, response, lower.CL, upper.CL, .group)
colnames(cld_dataNXSTLERN ) <- c( "N", "TLER","l","h", "Group")
cld_dataNXSTLERN  |> 
  data.frame() |> 
  kbl(align = "c") |> 
  kable_paper(full_width = F) |> 
  column_spec(1, bold = T)
```

#Year 1 Fall Total LERs model
```{r}
TotLERXF$NRATE<- as.numeric(TotLERXF$NRATE)
modTotLERXF<-lmer(LER~N*P + (1|Rep), data= TotLERXF)
anova(modTotLERXF)
summary(modTotLERXF)
#check assumptions 
TotLERXF_resid<-resid(modTotLERXF)
qqnorm(TotLERXF_resid)
qqline(TotLERXF_resid)
plot(modTotLERXF)
#Logtransform
modTotLERXF1<-lmer(log(LER)~N*P + (1|Rep), data=TotLERXF)
anova(modTotLERXF1)
#check assumptions logtransform (makes BETTER)
TotLERXF_resid1<-resid(modTotLERXF1)
qqnorm(TotLERXF_resid1)
qqline(TotLERXF_resid1)
plot(modTotLERXF1)

#Comparison plots
# Boxplot for Total LER
ggplot(TotLERXF, aes(x = P, y = LER, fill = as.factor(NRATE))) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(title = "XF Total LER by Location and N Rate", x = "Location", y = "Total LER")+
  geom_abline(intercept = 1, slope = 0, color = "red", linetype = "dashed")
# save figures/forage/TLER_boxplot_XF   775x630

max(TotLERXF$LER)
#linear plots
TotLERXF$predicted <- predict(modTotLERXF1, newdata = TotLERXF, re.form = NA)
ggplot(TotLERXF, aes(x = N, y = LER)) +
    geom_point() + geom_line(aes(N, exp(predicted)))+ #regression through backtransformed predicted values
  labs(x = "N-Rate (Kg/ha)", y = "Total LER (Kg/ha)") +  # Label the axes
  ggtitle("Year 1 F Relationship between Total LER and N-rate") +  # Add a title
scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160))+ #fix x axis scale
  ylim(0, 6.2) + # upper limit set by max(TotLERXF$LER)
  facet_wrap(~P, scales = "free_y",ncol=2)+ #make it by location (remove to make it across locations)
  scale_color_discrete(name = "Cropping System")+  #legend for colors
geom_abline(intercept = 1, slope = 0, color = "red", linetype = "dashed")
# save figures/forage/TLER_Nrate_yr1F

#TWO way emmeans
TotLERXF1emm <- compute_emmeansNXF2("modTotLERXF1")

#Pairwise P
emmsP <- emmeans(modTotLERXF1, ~ P, type = "response") # Obtain estimated marginal means
cld_dataTLERXFP <- cld(emmsP, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
cld_dataTLERXFP $response <- format(cld_dataTLERXFP $response, digits = 3)
cld_dataTLERXFP$lower.CL <- format(cld_dataTLERXFP$lower.CL, digits = 3)
cld_dataTLERXFP$upper.CL <- format(cld_dataTLERXFP$upper.CL, digits = 3)
rownames(cld_dataTLERXFP ) <- NULL
cld_dataTLERXFP <- cld_dataTLERXFP  %>%
  select( P, response, lower.CL, upper.CL, .group)
colnames(cld_dataTLERXFP ) <- c( "Site", "TLER","CI2.5%","CI97.5%", "Group")
cld_dataTLERXFP   |> 
  data.frame() |> 
  kbl(align = "c") |> 
  kable_paper(full_width = F) |> 
  column_spec(1, bold = T)
# save figures/forage/TLER_emmP_yr1F  250x245





#Pairwise N 
N_levels <- c(0, 40, 80, 120, 160)
emmsN <- emmeans(modTotLERXF1, specs = ~ N, at = list(N = N_levels), type = "response")
cld_dataNXFTLERN <- cld(emmsN, Letters=custom_letters) # Create compact letter display
cld_dataNXFTLERN $response <- format(cld_dataNXFTLERN $response, digits = 3)
cld_dataNXFTLERN$lower.CL <- format(cld_dataNXFTLERN$lower.CL, digits = 3)
cld_dataNXFTLERN$upper.CL <- format(cld_dataNXFTLERN$upper.CL, digits = 3)
rownames(cld_dataNXFTLERN ) <- NULL
cld_dataNXFTLERN <- cld_dataNXFTLERN  %>%
  select( N, response, lower.CL, upper.CL, .group)
colnames(cld_dataNXFTLERN ) <- c( "N", "TLER","l","h", "Group")
cld_dataNXFTLERN  |> 
  data.frame() |> 
  kbl(align = "c") |> 
  kable_paper(full_width = F) |> 
  column_spec(1, bold = T)
```

```{r}
# remove outlier from MN 160 ; has an LER of 15.3803089 becuase plot 1309 has a PlotTotForageKgHa value of 37.62429
TotLERYS_2 <- TotLERYS[-c(70), ] # this is the row with the outlier 

TotLERYS_2$NRATE<- as.numeric(TotLERYS_2$NRATE)
modTotLERYS_2<-lmer(LER~N*P + (1|Rep), data= TotLERYS_2)
anova(modTotLERYS_2)
#check assumptions

qqnorm(TotLERYS_2_resid)
qqline(TotLERYS_2_resid)
plot(modTotLERYS_2)
#Logtransform

anova(modTotLERYS_21)
#check assumptions logtransform (makes BETTER?)
TotLERYS_2_resid1<-resid(modTotLERYS_21)
qqnorm(TotLERYS_2_resid1)
qqline(TotLERYS_2_resid1)

    geom_boxplot() +
    labs(title = "YS Total LER by Location and N Rate", x = "Location", y = "Total LER")+
    geom_abline(intercept = 1, slope = 0, color = "red", linetype = "dashed")
# save figures/forage/TLER_boxplot_YS   775x630

#linear plots
```
